<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Swingrate
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Swingrate
$FNC-COST$ = 300; 250; 500; 1500; 2500; 6000
$FNC-Combatant-COST$ = 100; 250; 500; 1500; 2500; 6000
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$MCE$ = Total Price / $MDPS$
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FSE-UPGRADE$ = Warrior Armor; Dangersense; Extra Protection; Illumina; Darkheart Swordsman
$FSE-UPGRADEICON$ = 3356186535; 141745478; 4118882122; 16620737; 16868189
$FSE-DETECTION$ = 2; ;
$FSE-CATEGORY$ = Unavailable
$DREF$ = <ref>DPS assumes that only one enemy is hit per swing.<br />Ability is not taken into account.</ref>
$MDREF$ = <ref>DPS assumes that the maximum number of enemies are hit per swing.<br/>Ability is not taken into account.</ref>
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Brawler =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Swingrate !! Range !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 1 || 5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1  || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || 1 || 5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 5 || 1 || 5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 1 || 5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 25 || 0.75 || 5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 40 || 0.5 || 6 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|Combatant =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Swingrate !! Range !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 0.85 || 5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1  || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || 0.85 || 5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 5 || 0.85 || 5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 0.85 || 5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 25 || 0.75 || 5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 40 || 0.5 || 6 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
</tabber></div>
